title: phyllanthus revaughanii
intro: Phyllanthus revaughanii, also known as the Revaughan's phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and liver disorders. The health benefits of Phyllanthus revaughanii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate inflammation, and protect the liver from damage, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
